title: Center v0.2 on conversation authoring
reason: Task 052 updates ni's own locked plan so v0.2 is centered on conversation-driven authoring rather than user-entered CLI contract editing commands.
proposed_changes: Center the v0.2 purpose, success definition, delivery model, and interaction contract on ni init followed by model-user conversation through ni-start.
Keep ni status, ni-end, ni relock, and ni-run as deterministic CLI gates rather than model authority.
Record that contract add/list/set commands are not part of the v0.2 primary authoring UX.
risk_impact: Adds RISK-011 for CLI contract editing displacing conversation authoring and mitigates it by keeping v0.2 authoring in ni-start synchronized docs and contract updates.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because accepted capabilities still map to requirements, evaluations, artifacts, and mitigated high-severity risks.
